login.desc: Sign in with Discord to access the system dashboard
login.errorOauth: Discord verification failed. Please try later.
login.errorUnauth: You must be logged in first.

verify.desc: Enter the verification code to access the dashboard

home.adminOnly: Only servers where you have management permission

tickets.pageDesc: Manage your server's support ticket system, configure settings and monitor activity.
tickets.settingsDesc: Configure the ticket system behaviour for your server.
tickets.cardGeneralDesc: Ticket limits, language, close behaviour, feedback & more.
tickets.cardPanelsDesc: Customise ticket panels and open buttons.
tickets.cardCategoriesDesc: Organise tickets into categories with individual settings.
tickets.generalDesc: Core behaviour settings applied to all tickets in this server.
tickets.limitHelp: Maximum number of open tickets a user can have simultaneously. Prevents spam.
tickets.langHelp: Language used for all ticket messages, buttons and automatic responses.
tickets.allowCloseHelp: When ON, members can close their own ticket using the Close button.
tickets.confirmHelp: Shows a confirmation prompt before closing to prevent accidental closures.
tickets.feedbackHelp: After a ticket is closed, ask the user to rate the support (1–5 stars).
tickets.anonHelp: Hides member names in the dashboard, showing only User IDs.
tickets.threadHelp: Creates tickets as threads inside a channel instead of separate channels.
tickets.disableOpenHelp: Disables the slash command for opening tickets (useful if using panels only).
tickets.channelsSectionDesc: Configure where tickets are created, logged, and where notifications are sent.
tickets.notifChannelHelp: A message is posted here when a ticket is opened, closed, or claimed.
tickets.transcriptChannelHelp: Ticket transcripts (HTML/TXT) are uploaded here after a ticket is closed.
tickets.overflowCategoryHelp: Used when the primary category reaches Discord's 50-channel limit.
tickets.channelCategoryHelp: The main category where new ticket channels are created.
tickets.namingSchemeHelp: How ticket channels are named. Supports {user}, {number}, {date}.
tickets.welcomeMsgHelp: First message sent inside the ticket. Supports Discord markdown and mentions.
tickets.welcomeMsgPlaceholder:
Thank you for contacting support.
Please describe your issue.
tickets.claimSectionDesc: Control who can see and interact with claimed tickets.
tickets.claimViewHelp: ON: all staff can see a claimed ticket. OFF: only the claimer can view it.
tickets.claimTypeHelp: ON: all staff can send messages. OFF: only the claimer can type.
tickets.autoCloseSectionDesc: Automatically close inactive or abandoned tickets.
tickets.acLeaveHelp: Auto-close the ticket if the user who opened it leaves the server.
tickets.acNoResponseHelp: Auto-close if the user hasn't replied since opening (0 = disabled).
tickets.acLastMsgHelp: Auto-close after a period of no activity in the ticket (0 = disabled).
tickets.permSectionDesc: Control who can open tickets and what actions are allowed inside them.
tickets.openPermHelp: Who is allowed to open a ticket?
tickets.addMsgSenderHelp: If a ticket is opened via a message button, the message author is also added to the ticket channel.
tickets.permAttachHelp: Allow ticket participants to upload files.
tickets.permEmbedHelp: Allow ticket participants to send embedded links.
tickets.permReactHelp: Allow ticket participants to add emoji reactions.
tickets.appearSectionDesc: Customise the look and feel of ticket components.
tickets.colorSuccessHelp: Used for: open ticket, claim, successful feedback.
tickets.colorFailureHelp: Used for: no permission, ticket limit reached.
tickets.hideCloseHelp: Completely hide the close button from ticket channels.
tickets.hideCloseReasonHelp: Hide the "Close with reason" option from the close menu.
tickets.hideClaimHelp: Completely hide the claim button from ticket channels.
tickets.panelsDesc: Create and manage ticket panels that members can use to open support tickets.
tickets.multiPanelDesc: Group multiple ticket panels into a single combined message with a select menu.
tickets.mpChannelHelp: The channel where the combined multi-panel message will be sent.
tickets.mpPanelsHelp: Type the name of an existing panel and press Add.
tickets.mpMinWarn: At least 2 panels are required for a multi-panel.
tickets.mpUseDropdownHelp: ON: panels shown inside a select dropdown. OFF: panels shown as separate buttons.
tickets.mpPlaceholderHelp: The default instruction text shown inside the dropdown before a selection is made.
tickets.mpCustomizeHelp: Override the button text, emoji, or colour for each panel within this multi-panel without changing the original panel.
tickets.mpCustomizeEmpty: Add panels above to customise them individually.
tickets.mentionOnOpenHelp: Ping this role when a new ticket is opened.
tickets.panelTranscriptHelp: Where ticket transcripts are sent. Choose 'Use global setting' to inherit the server default.
tickets.deleteMentionsHelp: Automatically delete the role-mention message after it is sent.
tickets.createAsThreadHelp: Use threads instead of channels for tickets created from this panel.
tickets.threadNotifHelp: Post a notification in this channel when a new thread ticket is created.
tickets.cooldownHelp: Minimum seconds a member must wait before opening another ticket.
tickets.ticketCategoryHelp: Discord category where ticket channels are created.
tickets.maxOpenHelp: Set to 0 for unlimited. Users cannot open more tickets than this limit.
tickets.formHelp: Ask members to fill a form when opening this panel.
tickets.exitSurveyHelp: A form presented to the member when the ticket is closed.
tickets.awaitingCatHelp: Move the ticket channel to this category while waiting for a staff response.
tickets.panelContentHelp: The text shown in the panel embed. Supports Markdown.
tickets.panelContentPlaceholder: Click the button below to open a ticket.
tickets.panelColorHelp: Colour of the panel embed's left border.
tickets.panelChannelHelp: Select the channel where the panel message will be sent.
tickets.disablePanelHelp: Temporarily disable this panel so no new tickets can be opened.
tickets.btnColorHelp: Discord button colour for the open-ticket button.
tickets.btnEmojiHelp: Optional emoji to show on the button (standard emoji or custom Discord emoji ID).
tickets.largeImageHelp: Full-width image shown at the bottom of the embed.
tickets.smallImageHelp: Small image shown in the top-right of the embed.
tickets.welcomeDescPlaceholder: Thank you for contacting support. A staff member will be with you shortly.
tickets.welcomeTimestampHelp: Append the current date and time to the embed footer.
tickets.aclHelp: Control which roles or users can open tickets from this panel.
tickets.supportHoursHelp: Restrict when members can open tickets from this panel.
tickets.alwaysOpenHelp: When enabled, members can open tickets at any time.
